notes: Gareth is Thornwall's blacksmith. Gruff, direct, proud of his craft. Knows monster weaknesses from years of forging hunting gear.

greeting.text: Aye. What do you need, hunter? Make it quick — I'm in the middle of a temper.

responses.text: What can you tell me about the monsters out there?
Never mind, I'll leave you to it.

monster_info.text: Slimes mostly, this time of year. Soft bodies, but they'll swarm you if you're not paying attention. The green ones are fast — go for the core.

responses.text: Are there stronger ones deeper in the field?

stronger_monsters.text: Aye, and they're getting bolder. Whatever's stirring out east is pushing the smaller ones toward the edges. Watch yourself if you go deep.

prepare.text: Keep your blade sharp — obvious, I know. And don't get surrounded. One on one you'll be fine. Three at once and even a good hunter gets sloppy.

business.text: Can't complain. The guild keeps me busy patching up hunters who didn't listen to my advice. Speaking of which — bring me materials from the field and I can make it worth your while. Later.

materials.text: Slime cores, mostly. Maybe something harder if you can find it. Come back with a haul and we'll talk properly.
